record.field: Water Tank Cleaning — Standard
water_tank

We are thankful for the interest and confidence shown towards our services. With reference to the subject inquiry, please find our competitive proposal for water tank cleaning and disinfection as follows.

Our process starts with the deep cleaning of the entire water tank: draining out the existing water, cleaning the interior tanks, disinfection, washing and flushing the tanks, refilling the tanks with fresh water, and laboratory testing.

Aaban will provide Water Tank Cleaning and Disinfection at the site stated above, in accordance with the schedule detailed in this agreement. The tanks will be cleaned and disinfected as per Municipality standards and guidelines using environmentally friendly chemicals approved by the Municipality. Stains, sediment and mould are removed with brushes, and the tanks are thoroughly rinsed with fresh water and checked for pH neutrality before refilling.

The customer agrees to fulfil all technical guidelines requested by Aaban to secure the best results. Tanks should be drained by the client prior to the scheduled arrival of the cleaning team, or the client should provide access with the tank at 5-10% of water level or empty.
Safety

Aaban carries out all work strictly in accordance with the highest safety standards. All technicians are trained in all aspects of safety, are well supervised to ensure operations run smoothly, and are equipped with the required PPE (goggles, gloves, safety shoes, safety belts) and instruments for this process.
Tank Details
[Fill in for this site: tank type(s), capacity in USG, and total number of tanks — e.g. "RCC underground tank (30,000 USG x 1); GRP panel tank (5,000 USG x 1); total 2 tanks, 35,000 USG."]
Customer Responsibility

1. Tanks will be drained by the client prior to the scheduled arrival of the cleaning team, or the client will provide the tank at 5-10% of water level or empty. 2. Client to provide 220V single-phase electricity supply and water supply (60 litre/min) near the working location. 3. Work permit to be prepared in advance. 4. Client to ensure proper access is available to all units. 5. Client to arrange all passes and permits required for the vehicle and operator at the service location, or parking during service time. 6. Safe storage for Aaban's equipment until completion of work. 7. Waste disposal facility for removed debris. 8. An authorised person/staff should be present for verification and the completion report upon completion of each area. 9. Leftover water below suction level in the tanks will be drained by the operator into the client's drainage system.
After Service Report
Photographs will be taken before and after the work and included in the final report. The service report will be issued within 8-10 working days after completion of work.
Additional Contract Terms

As per the relevant Municipality's guidelines, the rooftop tank should be cleaned only after cleaning the main supply tank. If the client requests cleaning of the rooftop tank only and the water sample subsequently tests positive, Aaban will not be responsible for re-cleaning or re-sampling.
Anti-Termite Treatment — Standard
termite

Operations are carried out as per the relevant Municipality's stated/approved procedures and terms and conditions for pre-construction termite control, typically across three stages: Stage 1 — PCC & RCC; Stage 2 — vertical and horizontal treatment inside the tie beams; Stage 3 — vertical and horizontal treatment outside the tie beams.

Aaban will provide anti-termite treatment at the site stated above, in accordance with the treatment type and materials/methods detailed in this agreement, using procedures approved by the relevant Municipality.
Treatment Type
[Specify for this contract: e.g. "Spray (pre-construction)."]
Materials and Methods

1. All services will be provided as per the relevant Municipality's approved procedures. 2. All equipment and control treatment methods will conform to the standards set by the Municipality. 3. Aaban will inform the Second Party at least one day before treatment, by mutual agreement, and will arrange a representative for collaboration. 4. On-site electricity and water availability will be arranged/confirmed by the Second Party. 5. The Second Party will provide polythene sheeting of the required length and quality. 6. The Second Party will provide Aaban with access to the areas to be serviced.
Warranty Certificate

Aaban will provide a ten (10) year warranty for the treated areas as per the scope of treatment and service area reports. The payment amount is charged at the rate given per square metre. During the warranty period, services for the treated area will be provided without additional cost. The warranty applies to the treated area only.
Deep Cleaning — Standard
cleaning_deep
We are thankful for the interest and confidence shown towards our service for deep cleaning. With reference to the subject inquiry, please find our competitive proposal for the same as follows.

Deep cleaning covers, as applicable to the site: toilets (cabinets, drawers, sink and faucet descaling, shower head, walls, seat, exhaust fan, flooring, mirrors and glass doors); kitchen (sink and faucet descaling, walls, hood and countertop de-greasing, flooring); general areas (cabinets, light fixtures, AC grills, walls, corners, windows and frames, glass and wooden doors); flooring (ceramic, wooden and marble, machine-scrubbed, paint-mark removal where possible); ceiling (AC ventilation grills, corners, lights and spot lights); and external areas (balcony/parking floor, handrails and corners, where accessible).

Aaban will provide Deep Cleaning services at the site stated above, in accordance with the scope and schedule detailed in this agreement, using scrubber machines and appropriate cleaning agents for each surface type.
Pest Control — Dubai
pest

With reference to the above-mentioned subject and subsequent inspection, we are pleased to provide our best quote for pest control services. The pesticides used are strictly approved by the Ministry of Climate Change and Environment.

Public Health Pest Control Agreement — Aaban Classic Building Cleaning & Pest Control Services (Dubai branch) is authorised by the Public Health Pest Control Section, Dubai Municipality, to carry out pest control operations at the Second Party's site under this agreement, as per the specifications and requirements below.

Instructions and Terms and Conditions are as per Municipality Local Order No. 11 of 2003. The Second Party is responsible for keeping its establishment, premises or construction site free from public health pests and for not providing a favourable environment for their breeding, for the safety of the Dubai Emirate community.
Dubai Municipality Compliance

All pest control operations are carried out as per the Dubai Sustainable Public Health Pest Control Model approved by the Public Health Pest Control Section, Dubai Municipality, which is considered an integral part of this agreement. A specific report is prepared after each operation, and a monthly report, both per Dubai Municipality's standard report formats, specifying: areas visited; date of visit; pests found and infestation level; treatments carried out; follow-up visit dates (if any); pesticides used; and instructions/recommendations.
Visit Frequency and Reporting

Routine visits: two visits per month for food and beverage (F&B) establishments; one visit per month for non-food establishments, premises and buildings. Follow-up visits: where infestation is reported during a routine visit, a follow-up visit is conducted every three days until the infestation disappears, with a report prepared per the standard format. Complaint/call-out visits: on a complaint from the Second Party, Aaban will visit the site the same day and carry out pest control operations as per the Public Health Pest Control Section Dubai Municipality standards.
Pesticides and Records

Pesticides used must be registered with the Ministry of Climate Change and Environment and used per the manufacturer's recommendations. Aaban maintains a complete pest control file, accessible to the Second Party within 15 minutes of request, containing: in-charge contact details; a copy of this agreement; the list of pesticides used with registration certificates and MSDS; all visit and monthly reports; trap location maps; and a copy of the latest ministerial decree on banned/restricted pesticides. Fumigation or termite control operations require prior approval from the Public Health Pest Control Section, Dubai Municipality.
Second Party Commitments

The Second Party agrees to: pay Aaban the agreed amount per the agreed payment terms; prepare the necessary working permits and approvals; and take corrective action on instructions and recommendations raised by Aaban. Legal action may be taken if the Second Party's premises remain infested due to its own non-compliance (e.g. uncleared litter, trash or kitchen debris).
Termination (Dubai Municipality Notification)

This contract may be terminated where: both parties agree to terminate at any time; there is no approved pest control supervisor within the company; the company is temporarily or permanently closed due to violations; or the pest control activity licence is cancelled. Either party must notify the Public Health Pest Control Section, Dubai Municipality in writing of any termination.
Service

The First Party agrees to supply Water Tank Cleaning and Disinfection at the site stated above. Aaban will provide the services during the hours agreed with the Second Party and in accordance with the schedule detailed in this agreement. The First Party will ensure that everybody providing the services has the necessary training and authorization to do so.
The Scope of Work

We will chemically clean and disinfect your tank to remove all of the bacteria, mould, algae, sludge and sediment and almost all of the staining inside the tank. The tanks will be cleaned and disinfected as per Municipality standards and guidelines using appropriate environmentally friendly chemicals approved by the Municipality. The water tanks will be cleaned and disinfected by spraying chemicals on the inner surface of the tanks. Stains, sediment and mould will be removed with the help of brushes. The tanks will then be thoroughly rinsed with fresh water and checked for pH neutrality before allowing them to be refilled. Draining out the existing water, cleaning the interior tanks, disinfection, washing and flushing the tanks, refilling the tanks with fresh water, laboratory testing.
Contract Termination
Both parties can terminate the contract by giving the other party 30 days' prior notice, without the requirement of assigning any reason.
Commencement of Services

The First Party will commence the agreed services within ten (10) days from the date the Second Party signs the contract and delivers it to the First Party. The Second Party agrees to provide the First Party access to the areas to be serviced during the hours agreed. The Second Party may incur additional costs if the First Party is required to provide an unscheduled service.
The Scope of Work

Operations will be carried out as per the relevant Municipality's stated/approved procedures and terms and conditions for pre-construction termite control strategies: Stage 1: PCC and RCC. Stage 2: Vertical and horizontal treatment inside the tie beams. Stage 3: Vertical and horizontal treatment outside the tie beams.
Scope of Work

Deep cleaning covers, as applicable to the site: Toilet cleaning — cabinets and drawers, sink and faucet descaling, shower head descaling, walls, seat, exhaust fan, shower area, deep cleaning of flooring, mirrors and glass doors. Kitchen — sink and faucet descaling, walls, de-greasing of hood and countertop, deep cleaning of flooring. General — bedroom cabinets (emptied by client), light fixtures, AC grills, walls, corners, internal windows, window frames and sills, glass and wooden doors. Flooring — ceramic, wooden and marble flooring using scrubber machines; removal of paint marks where possible. Ceiling — AC ventilation grills, ceiling corners, ceiling lights and spot lights (where accessible and in place). External — balcony/parking floor, handrails and corners (where accessible).
Pest Control — Standard
pest

With reference to the above-mentioned subject and subsequent inspection, we are pleased to provide our best quote for pest control services. Please be informed that the pesticides used for pest control are strictly approved by the pest control section of the relevant Municipality and the Ministry of Climate Change and Environment.

Trained operators will keenly inspect each area of the premises prior to any pest control activity to assess the level of pest infestation, then carry out pest control against cockroaches, ants and other crawling insects. Safe control will be carried out using chemicals strictly approved by the pest control section of the relevant Municipality and the Ministry of Climate Change and Environment.
Service

The First Party agrees to supply pest control services to the Second Party at the site stated above. Aaban will provide the services during the hours agreed with the Second Party and in accordance with the schedule detailed in this agreement. The First Party will ensure that everybody providing the services has the necessary training and authorization to do so.
Service Schedule

The customer agrees to fulfil all technical guidelines requested by Aaban to secure the best results. The Second Party will make its representative available with Aaban's technicians during the treatment. All areas that are not made ready/cleaned for the scheduled treatment will be avoided and treated on the next treatment.
Unscheduled Services and Conditions of Supply

The First Party will attend to unscheduled services at the request of the Second Party only twice during the whole contract period. If the requested service results from an area previously serviced which is still under warranty, the First Party will provide the service at no charge to the Second Party. Any additional service will be served after quote approval from the Second Party.
Exclusions
This contract excludes fumigation for stored-product pests. This contract excludes termite and wood-pest treatments. This contract excludes bird control and stray animals.
Commencement of Services

The First Party will commence the agreed services within ten (10) days from the date the Second Party signs the contract and delivers it to the First Party. The Second Party agrees to provide the First Party access to the areas to be serviced during the hours agreed. The Second Party may incur additional costs if the First Party is required to provide an unscheduled service.
Contract Termination
At the end of the contract period, this contract will continue to be valid and renewed against the same conditions unless otherwise cancelled by either party giving one month's notice.
Terms as per Municipality Local Order No. 11 (2003)

The Second Party is responsible for keeping its establishment, premises or construction site free from public health pests and for not providing a favourable environment for their breeding and spreading, for the safety of the Dubai Emirate community. The First Party is hereby authorised by the Public Health Pest Control Section, Dubai Municipality, to exercise pest control operations at the Second Party's sites as per the specifications and requirements in this agreement.
